names.details: "AMIENS, in Latin Ambienum, Ambicnum, anciently Samarobriva, Samarobrica, or Samarobriga. So called from its situation on the river Somme. It is the capital of Picardy and county of Amineois, and is a place of great antiquity..."

history.comment: added dates 19th-21st centuries with references to BAtlDir and Wikiidata @thomase
